step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a plain white background. The Z letter has a navy blue circle behind it, and the C letter has a mint green circle behind it. No regulatory or additional text is present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows the ZONNIC logo centered left on a plain white background. The Z letter has a navy blue circle behind it, and the C letter has a mint green circle behind it. No regulatory or additional text is present.
CONTENT TYPE: logo_only

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center left
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: YES
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): YES ⚠ WRONG LETTER!
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: Z
  Halo colour: navy blue (behind Z), mint green (behind C)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: navy blue (behind Z), mint green (behind C)
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: plain white background

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, mint green, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: mint green used as accent behind C

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image displays the ZONNIC logo in navy blue text on a plain white background. There is a circular navy blue shape behind the Z letter and a mint green circle behind the C letter. The logo is centered left, and the text is bold and sans-serif. No regulatory text, nicotine warning, 18+ icon, or risk communication is present anywhere in the image. The logo text colour is correct for the background, and the clear space around the logo is sufficient. However, the logo is altered: a circle is incorrectly placed behind the Z letter, which is not allowed, and the halo behind the C is a solid colour instead of a gradient, which is required on white backgrounds. Additionally, all mandatory regulatory elements are missing. To comply, the logo must only have a gradient halo behind the C, and all required regulatory text and icons must be added.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
No 18+ age restriction icon is visible in the image.
No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible and correctly positioned.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
Halo is present on both the C and Z letters; the Z should not have a halo. The C halo is a solid colour instead of a gradient.
Logo is modified with a circle behind the Z letter and does not follow the official layout.
Background is plain white, which is appropriate for logo display.
No gradient background is present, so gradient direction and split do not apply.
Logo-only content on a white background is acceptable for brand assets.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue, mint green, white) are used.
Bold sans-serif font is used, matching brand requirements.
No grey gradient background is used in this image.
Clear space around the logo is sufficient and meets guidelines.
Halo colours do not blend into the background, and no logo shapes or containers are used.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required bilingual nicotine warning statement at the top of the image.
violations.evidence: No warning text detected anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon is visible in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No age icon detected anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No risk text detected anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements are missing and not positioned correctly.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and risk communication plus 18+ icon at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The halo behind the C is a solid colour instead of a gradient on a white background.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the C halo to a gradient using both primary and secondary colours.
violations.evidence: Halo behind C is mint green only, not a gradient.

violations.rule_text: Don't add the halo on the Z instead of the C.
violations.issue: A circle is incorrectly placed behind the Z letter.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove the circle behind the Z letter; only the C should have a halo.
violations.evidence: Navy blue circle detected behind Z letter.

violations.rule_text: Don't outline other letters in the logo (only C gets the halo).
violations.issue: A circular shape is present behind the Z letter, which is not allowed.
violations.fix_suggestion: Remove the circle behind the Z letter.
violations.evidence: Navy blue circle detected behind Z letter.

violations.rule_text: The logo should never be altered or recreated in any way.
violations.issue: Logo is modified with a circle behind the Z letter, which is not part of the official design.
violations.fix_suggestion: Restore the logo to its official design: only the C should have a halo.
violations.evidence: Circle detected behind Z letter; logo layout altered.
